message:
feat(spawn): add --assign-cc-only/cod-only/gmi-only agent type filter aliases

Add convenience boolean flags (--assign-cc-only, --assign-cod-only,
--assign-gmi-only) as shorthand aliases for --assign-agent=claude/codex/
gemini. The resolveSpawnAssignAgentType() helper normalizes these with
--assign-agent taking precedence when both are set.

Includes test coverage for alias resolution, precedence, and case
normalization, plus flag registration validation in common_flags_test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
